en.title: FUD FAQ | A Weekly Community Thread | Week 13

blocks.value: FUD FAQ | A Weekly Community Thread | Week 13
Top Question of the Week
How can I be more of a part of DIGITALAX as a designer, creator, metaverse dweller?

This week DIGITALAX made a very exciting announcement about the expansion of our Global Designer Network, bringing together creators from all walks of life that align with our mission of decentralisation and open source for the fashion industry, and taking the next steps for seeding a web3 fashion industry that is built right; overturning gatekeepers that have become comfortable with closed, exploitative, predatory, unsustainable and studio dominant bullshit.
This is just the beginning as this Network is collated into a real designer DAO; underpinning the open fabric of a new digital fashion revolution.

If this is something that aligns with you or, you would like to live this mission with us, reach out! You don’t need to be an expert designer, creator, artist etc. If you share the same vision, we would love to have you on board!
Most Common Repeat Questions
What is The DLTA and where can PODE holders find out more?

The DLTA is a newly formed semi-stealth project out of San Francisco, USA, and involves key members of the crypto and tech community from the Valley and Bay area. DIGITALAX has been one of the key nodes in anchoring the testing, ideation, development and deployment of it. It is native to Polygon Network.

The Player Creator Portal and the role of the PODE holders in it is not an overnight endeavor and there are certain precursors that must be implemented first. We have now reached the time of activating one of these very important precursors.

All information released so far about the relationship between PODE and The DLTA system can be found in this article and this project overview . Any questions can be asked in our telegram and discord chats. There will be more announcements released shortly with next steps for PODE holders as they integrate as an initial guild within The DLTA system.
Top Controversies in the Industry

John McAfee was a big controversial character within crypto and on the world stage. This week he was found hanging inside his prison cell. It was determined that this was due to suicide, despite his many consistent claims that if he was ever found hanging in prison it wouldn’t be due to his own doing. Whether there is more to the story remains unclear.
“Sometimes a cigar is just a cigar” — Sigmund Freud
Silly Fails and Trolling

This is not a silly fail. It’s a seriously concerning and disturbing big fail. The Misfit University’s random generator for creating their unique character NFTs was definitely not thoroughly examined, inspected, looked over. And, it opens up a whole other bunch of concerning questions about what images the algorithm was actually fed….
If you would like a question answered or contribute content to next weeks article please reach out through our DIGITALAX discord server in #FUD-FAQ channel!
Join our Community!
Twitter: https://twitter.com/DIGITALAX_
Discord: https://discord.gg/DKbSqRGtKv
Medium: https://medium.com/@digitalax
Telegram: https://t.me/digitalaxTG

ازاي can I be more من a part من DIGITALAX as a designer, creator, metaverse dweller?

This اسبوع DIGITALAX made a very exciting announcement about ال expansion من our Global Designer Network, bringing together creators من all walks من life that align مع our mission من decentralisation و open source لـ ال فاشون industry, و taking ال next steps لـ seeding a web3 فاشون industry that is built right; overturning gatekeepers that have become comfortable مع closed, exploitative, predatory, unsustainable و studio dominant bullshit.

Most الاسئلة المتكررة
What is ال DLTA و where can PODE holders find out more?

ال DLTA is a newly formed semi-stealth project out من San Francisco, USA, و involves key members من ال crypto و tech المجتمع من ال Valley و Bay area. DIGITALAX has been one من ال key nodes في anchoring ال testing, ideation, development و deployment من it. It is native الى Polygon Network.

ال Player Creator Portal و ال role من ال PODE holders في it is not an overnight endeavor و there are certain precursors that must be implemented first. We have now reached ال time من activating one من these very important precursors.

All information released so far about ال relationship between PODE و ال DLTA system can be found في this article و this project overview . Any اسئلة can be asked في our telegram و discord chats. There will be more announcements released shortly مع next steps لـ PODE holders as they integrate as an initial guild within ال DLTA system.
Top Controversies في ال Industry

John McAfee was a big controversial character within crypto و على ال world stage. This اسبوع he was found hanging inside his prison cell. It was determined that this was due الى suicide, despite his many consistent claims that if he was ever found hanging في prison it wouldn’t be due الى his own doing. Whether there is more الى ال story remains unclear.
"أحيانًا السيجار بيكون مجرد سيجار" — سيغموند فرويد
Silly Fails و Trolling

This is not a silly fail. It’s a seriously concerning و disturbing big fail. ال Misfit University’s random generator لـ creating their unique character NFTs was definitely not thoroughly examined, inspected, looked over. و, it opens up a whole other bunch من concerning اسئلة about what images ال algorithm was actually fed….
